TextENGNew: ``--Riku!@k@vS16/45/DS43070761. Where are you, Riku?!``
I straddled down the worn floorboards of the hallway one after another, shouting while shaking my still partially wet hair.
I saw a stray cat that happened to be climbing onto the veranda jolt with surprise and flee, but I no longer had the mind to pay it any attention.
My whole body was flushed, steam rising from under my short sleeves and my forehead matted with sweat.
...And it wasn't simply because I'd just gotten out of the bath.
``Riku!!``
I very forcefully opened the sliding door to the living room, without bothering to knock or say anything.
...He's not here.
``You bastard!!``
I checked the bedroom next.
...He wasn't there either.
``You son of a bitch!``
Then the kitchen.
...Not there either.
``Show yourself, dammit!``
I raised my voice, irritated at the frustration of not having found him right away.
...Damn it, he's normally around so much that it gets annoying, so why isn't he here at a time like this?!
I looked at the floor of the front entrance to find a pair of sandals missing, and the sliding door was open.
I went outside and ultimately found Riku cleaning the shrine grounds.
``There you are, Riku!!``
Riku stopped sweeping his broom and looked at me when I called out to him in clear anger.
And whether he noticed my rage or not, he gave me his typical gentle smile.
``Is something the matter?``
I suddenly gasped and fell speechless at his borderline innocent kind smile.
These days, looking straight at Riku's smile would quell my anger like drawing venom from a wou...
...No, no! This was his strategy, don't be fooled!
``You sure have guts to ask me what's the matter!@k@vS16/45/DS43070771. You did it all over again!!``
``...??@k@vS16/46/DS43020408. Did what?@k@vS16/46/DS43020409. I took my medicine today.``
``Agh, for all that is sacred!@k@vS16/45/DS43070773. I don't mean your medicine, I mean my clothes!@k@vS16/45/DS43070774. The change of clothes you left on the hamper in the bathroom!!``
``Ah, how does it feel?@k@vS16/46/DS43020411. It's a new one I had tailored just yesterday.``
``That doesn't matter!``
No, it actually did matter, but...
And did he say he just had it tailored? By who?
...No, forget it, that wasn't the matter at hand.
``Look!@k@vS16/45/DS43070777. I'm asking you what the deal is with these clothes you put out for me!!``
``Uh, as you can see, it's a miko outfit.@k@vS16/46/DS43020413. A mi-ko out-fit.@k@vS16/46/DS43020414. ...You know what those words mean, right?@k@vS16/46/DS43020415. A miko is...``

``Yes yes, I know, you've spoon-fed me the explanation so many times it's made me sick!@k@vS16/45/DS43070779. Are you going to spend another half day prattling on and on about that sketchy ``miko moe`` fraud?``
I stomped on the stone pavement to cut off this truly unnecessary speech.
But Riku simply swung his finger daringly, went ``tsk tsk tsk``, and proudly spoke to me.
``You've got it all wrong, Hanyuu.@k@vS16/46/DS43020417. What I told you before was merely the preface to the prologue, ``What Is A Miko?``.``
``The main story continues afterwards into Chapter 1, ``To Become a Miko``.@k@vS16/46/DS43020419. Chapter 2 is ``About the Beauty of Mikos``,@k@vS16/46/DS43020420. and Chapter 3 is...``
``I never want to hear or know about those for all eternity!@k@vS16/45/DS43070781. Look, how many times do I have to tell you that's not what I'm asking about until you'll get it?!!``
``...This is still only the second time, though.``
I swear! This Sorcerer of Words always has a comeback for everything!
``What are you upset about?``
``How could I not be upset?!@k@vS16/45/DS43070783. You made me wear these clothes!!``
And with those words, I threw off the bath sheet I had been wearing on my shoulders as a stopgap measure...
...And then I showed him the red and white miko vestments I had been concealing beneath it.
``Wh-whoaaaa~~!@k@vS16/46/DS43020424. H-how lovely...!``
``That's your first impression?!!``
I rolled up my sleeves that felt like they were going to slip down, while shaking my raised fist.
He got me... I finally fell for his dumbass plan...!
``Yes, it looks very good on you.@k@vS16/46/DS43020426. My judgment was not mistaken after all.``
``~~!@k@vS16/45/DS43070786. I-I don't need your sketchy compliments!@k@vS16/45/DS43070787. I thought I told you I would never wear a miko outfit!``
``...And what in the world is this?!``
When he complimented me, I was a little... seriously, just a little... happy, but I mustered all my reason and shook it off.
Then I drew near this great fool, who was nonchalantly smiling at me without the least abashment.

...In the first place, had it just been the haori jacket and pants, I wouldn't have really minded. I may have rejected miko outfits at first because I was embarrassed, but even from my perspective, I thought they gave off a pure aura, and by no means did I hate them.
But the problem was... this miko outfit had been customized to the point it was a little... no, very amorous! Someone's fetishes were on full display here, and I wanted nothing to do with it!
It had the red strings decorating the sleeves, but it was still fine!
It was also lacking in any inner clothes of the pants, which made me feel so drafty that I was very embarrassed, but still willing to compromise!
...But what I couldn't forgive was how the sleeves were parted at the shoulder, showing off my upper arms!!
Even after all I told him about how showing skin was a disgrace for Ryuun women!!

``The last one had exposed cleavage!@k@vS16/45/DS43070790. The one before that had pants that stopped just a hair's breadth away from the crotch!@k@vS16/45/DS43070791. And now we have this work of the devil!``
``How many times do I have to tell you not to play with my change of clothes until you'll get it?!!``
``I didn't play with them.@k@vS16/46/DS43020428. I spend night after night wracking my brain over what kind of miko outfit you would like...``
``Well, all you're doing is making me hate them more!!``
I rolled the bath sheet I was holding into a ball and threw it on the ground as I began roaring in rage.
...Time really does fly. It'll soon be summer, marking two years since I met Riku.
Though young, he works as the priest of Furude Shrine and has a good reputation amongst the villagers.
Although he's revered as Oyashiro-sama's reincarnation, he is kind and gentle without letting that get to his head. And even though he's easygoing, he gets the job done.
Even I have a favorable impression of his attitude. I can see why the villagers trust him.
(I admit that... I admit it, but...!)
But! His sudden and incorrigible repeated requests for me to wear a miko outfit... they weren't just eccentric, they undoubtedly negated all the positives about him!
So I would reject him harshly every time, yell at him, and occasionally resort to force (brute force, that is) to show him the error of his ways.
...But in spite of that, rather than repenting, he would keep coming up with plan after plan to try to get me to wear one of his customized miko outfits whenever he got the chance.
And... and today, he'd finally subjected me to this humiliation... Kh!
``You say all of that, yet you still put it on... Does that mean you like it?``
``How shameless!@k@vS16/45/DS43070796. This coming from the one who threw all my other clothes into the laundry tub!!``
And he even made sure to soak the clothes I'd taken off just before going into the bath!
...Given that, I couldn't very well walk around naked after getting out of the bath, so it was only reluctantly and with heartfelt grief that I put this thing on!
``...Hey, are you even listening, Riku?!``

``Sorry~.@k@vS16/46/DS43020431. It's just that you finally put on a miko outfit after my decade-long perseverance!@k@vS16/46/DS43020432. Oh, happy day! I must celebrate!@k@vS16/46/DS43020433. Uuu...!``

``Hey, stop crying!@k@vS16/45/DS43070799. I didn't ``put`` it on, I was ``forced to put`` it on!@k@vS16/45/DS43070800. And where's this ``decade-long`` crap coming from?! We've only spent two years together!!``
``Maybe I should say every day felt like an eternity instead?``
I threw a punch at Riku as he nonchalantly said that while shedding crocodile tears, only for him to dodge it.
...Dammit, not only is he eloquent, his intuition's been getting sharper recently!

``Will you please cut it out already?!@k@vS16/45/DS43070802. You're a grown man obsessing over miko outfits!@k@vS16/45/DS43070803. I know this sounds weird coming from a foreigner like me, but you are aware that you're a priest in the service of a god, right?!``
``Of course.@k@vS16/46/DS43020437. I live my life proud and blessed that I was born into the family that protects Furude Shrine.``
``It is my duty to quell the anger of the demons who attacked this village and console the souls of those who regretfully lost their lives.``
...What he was saying was respectable, but I just couldn't take it at face value given the situation.
``...However, the demon attacks have come to a sudden halt recently, and things are currently peaceful.``
``So, as a servant of God, I have been lost in thought recently on how to solemnly respect her divine will and keep the faith of the people strong.``
``What does that have to do with this modified miko outfit?``
Realizing that a most unpleasant turn of events was approaching, I frantically covered my mouth.
But it was already too late. Riku's eyes blazed with unbridled excitement, and seizing the moment he had been waiting for, he grasped both my shoulders with an eager 'There it is!'
changeReason: New translation captures the exclamatory expression from 待ってましたとばかりに more explicitly with 'There it is!'

TextENGNew: C-crap! Has Riku's ``Miko Miko Heaven: Love Fraud`` Reality Marble begun like always?!
``I'm glad you asked!@k@vS16/46/DS43020442. Listen, a miko is an unstained maiden, one who serves the gods and is respected for her moral purity.``
``Their symbol, that perfect harmony of red and white, is truly the embodiment of that sublimity that controls all, that guides all to the heavens!``

``However, on its own, the only worth it has is inorganic matter lacking the finishing touches.@k@vS16/46/DS43020445. Therefore, for flesh and blood to be clad in it and wish people well in a live voice like a living god, the beauty of the wearer is important!``
``And the factor that compensates for that missing piece is... to teach the innate beauty of that maiden in a category that everyone can understand!``

``In other words, those assets are the chest!@k@vS16/46/DS43020448. The thighs!@k@vS16/46/DS43020449. The upper arms!@k@vS16/46/DS43020450. And the curves on the neck!@k@vS16/46/DS43020451. To express those without any exceptions is my long-held ambition!``
``A-are you trying to play off perversion as something sublime?``
``Nay!@k@vS16/46/DS43020453. That is wrong! Quite wrong!``
``You won't cause any human innovation with a mindset like those uneducated types who lump merely any strong-willed women together as ``tsunderes``!``
``The notion that a viewpoint grounded in aesthetics can be interpreted as something vulgar and obscene is truly shameful and foolish!``
``Besides!@k@vS16/46/DS43020457. Those who bear such wicked feelings for mikos are not men!@k@vS16/46/DS43020458. No, they are not even human!@k@vS16/46/DS43020459. They're animals!``
``...You look like one of those animals to me.``
Naturally, he completely ignored my statement.
...Finally, I got fed up with that lengthy, no, endless enumeration of unintelligible words that my language skills couldn't keep up with, so I spoke up in a strong tone of voice.
``...So?@k@vS16/45/DS43070810. What exactly are you trying to say in the end?``
``Glory to miko outfits!!``
``That was iiiiiiit?!!``
``Aghoh?!``
I twisted my hips and punched from a sunken position at point-blank range.
Naturally, Riku was unable to react to a serious full-powered punch of mine, and let out a delightful scream as he was blown away, drawing an amusingly beautiful whirlwind as he did.
``Mmm, I still can't dodge from point-blank range.@k@vS16/46/DS43020463. I'll have to train some more...@k@vS16/46/DS43020464. O-ow ow!``
``...And what kind of training would this be?``
I glared at Riku as he lay by the veranda.
...I was the one who'd put the wet towel on his forehead and the pillow under him. I know it's strange to say this after I punched him, but he was really high-maintenance.
``You do all this knowing I'll get mad, don't you?@k@vS16/45/DS43070814. Do you enjoy getting punched?@k@vS16/45/DS43070815. Are you some sort of deviant?``
``I'm hurt~.@k@vS16/46/DS43020466. But... red really does look good on you.@k@vS16/46/DS43020467. ...That outfit is very cute.``
``...I would have shown joy out of courtesy were it a proper outfit.``

``Ahaha...@k@vS16/46/DS43020469. Once I got started on the outfit, I just got carried away at some point.@k@vS16/46/DS43020470. Besides, when I imagined what sort of reaction you'd have, I wanted to try pleasing the crowd.``
``You really are a deviant.@k@vS16/45/DS43070818. ...I'm not playing along.``
I snorted and swiftly looked away.
For him to see me blushing when he called would make me peeved... and embarrassed.
(This man, I swear...)
It's been nearly two years... and our relationship hasn't changed a bit.
We still get overly worked up over trivial things and fool around.
...Well, sometimes we get a little carried away and take it too far, like just now, but I guess you could call it some strange sort of prank game between Riku and me.
Looking at it as a whole, it was merrymaking on par with child's play.
But even though I get mad at times like these, I'm also happy, and even though I dislike it, I'm also having fun.
From when I was a child up until I met Riku in this land... I had lived my life almost entirely alone.

Having had little to no memory of my parents for as long as I can remember, and having been given my mission shortly after I came of age, I barely recall having close conversations with anyone outside missions.

Instead, I focused single-mindedly on finding my targets, investigating them, and delivering appropriate judgment afterwards... And in the process of constantly repeating that, I didn't take any opportunities to interact with others.
So maybe that's why... I've found it so fresh and surprising to learn that talking to others is so much fun, ever since I met Riku after getting hurt on that mountain.
(And besides...)
Even Riku acts like a perfect angel around everyone else, yet only shows this playful and childlike side to me.
Perhaps I'm being conceited, but I take that to mean he holds a different kind of affection for me than he does for anyone else.
...That makes me so happy.
Something begins fluttering.
I spot pale pink petals riding and dancing on a gentle spring breeze.
The cherry blossoms adorning the shrine grounds were at last in full bloom.
changeReason: Corrects verb tense from present to past to match the Japanese だった (past tense)

TextENGNew: Just then, I sensed a gentle presence.
I tilted my head and looked to discover a lone petal sticking to my pants.
I pinched it, only to find it was so soft it felt it could melt in my fingers.
When I brought it to my lips, it had a sweet and gentle fragrance, and I smiled as I looked up and watched the cherry blossoms.
``It truly is spring now, huh?``
The dazzling sun became particles of light, like sparkling raindrops, as it shone between the long drooping branches of the trees.
The countless lustrous flowers backed by the blue sky were fantastical, transient, and literally beautiful like haze.
I love this scenery.
It wasn't until I saw these dazzling cherry blossom trees that I learned the true definition of the word beautiful.
Even though I'd seen enough springs to make me sick of them, I found myself unconsciously charmed by this sight.
...Even the boisterous feelings I'd had just a minute ago faded away before them.
````Although your master is gone, do not forget the spring``, I believe it went?``
``That poem's about plums, not cherry blossoms, right?@k@vS16/45/DS43070825. Heehee...``
``Ah... Yes, you are right.``
I heard Riku's faint murmur and teased him for it.
Even then, when a foreigner like me pointed out his mistake, he just gave an awkward, bitter smile... that was positively radiant.
``But you know...@k@vS16/46/DS43020475. I was thinking that, unlike Michizane's poem, these cherry blossom trees will likely bloom when this season comes, even without me.``
``That's true.@k@vS16/45/DS43070827. After all, they do seem strong, unlike their unreliable master.``
``Ahaha, that's harsh.``
``Ahahaha...``
The flying plum trees had already lost their smell and spread their green, and if you looked closely, you could see some young green leaves on the cherry blossom trees.
...Just as Riku said, these trees were showing signs they were already preparing for the upcoming summer, so it seemed they hadn't forgotten the seasons.
Right. Just like they hadn't last year.
The trees keep on changing colors with the seasons forever and ever, just like when they watch over the village.
I felt no sentimentality or exhaustion. Just peace and quiet.
The reason why this ordinary life feels so irreplaceable and precious to me in spite of its tedium... is surely because I feel very happy right now.
That's right. I'm happy... No doubt about it.
But...
``Hanyuu.``
``It will soon be the third summer.@k@vS16/46/DS43020479. ...Since you came to this village, I mean.``
``I hope nothing threatening happens this year either.@k@vS16/46/DS43020481. ...Just like last year.``
``Yes, seriously...``
I gently looked away from Riku as I flicked the flower petal on my fingertip. It unreliably fluttered and danced to the ground.
...Unlike that battle to the death two years ago, last year had been surprisingly peaceful all the way through. If possible, I earnestly hoped this year would be the same.
(That's what I hope... but...)
...I'd been forced to take up arms after that day when the sudden news dropped on my lap.
Things were peaceful and quiet for now, but as someone who'd been through such an experience, I couldn't say for sure it would stay that way forever...
``Your mission is to slay the demons... the ``Half-Bloods`` who bring tragedy to this world.@k@vS16/46/DS43020483. ...That's what you told me, right?``
``Yes... What about it?``
``How long will that go on?``
That was obvious. Until the menace of the Grifys had vanished from this world completely.
How ridiculous. Who did I think I was fooling...?
Hadn't I already been made painfully aware that was impossible and unrealistic?
Indeed... it would be more accurate to say that my duty as a Jedha would continue indefinitely.
Not until I was slain or reached the end of my lifespan...
Even so, I didn't want to actually say that.
Because it would once again make me feel empty about that staggering duty and mission... No, that wasn't all.
Riku is a kind man. If he learned about this... I'm sure he'd sympathize and get depressed.
It would be one thing if it were just me, but my pride wouldn't allow me to make someone I cared so deeply for feel that way.
...I sure am stubborn, aren't I...
``Hanyuu...?``

``Let me think.@k@vS16/45/DS43070836. I do not know how long it will take, but I'm sure it will end someday.@k@vS16/45/DS43070837. ...However, I believe that will take decades, or even centuries, so likely not in your lifetime.``
``...@k@vS16/46/DS43020487. That's truly a pity.@k@vS16/46/DS43020488. I wanted to thank you right to your face once you were all done.``
``Ahahaha...``
Riku smiled, and asked no further.
I could tell from looking at his face that he surely wanted say something else, deep down... Still, I was inwardly grateful for his kind consideration.
(...In Riku's lifetime, huh?)
It was something scary that I didn't want to think about... but it was an inescapable fact.
Riku and I had completely different lifespans. Even if this peace and tranquility continued, I would undoubtedly have to witness his death someday.
What would I do after that?
Cry until my tears dried up, and lose the will to live?
Seek out further missions until I was slain, in order to bury the void in my heart?
Either way, that future wouldn't be very distant. So I definitely felt the need deep down to prepare myself for that.
``Come to think of it, you told me about ``assimilation`` once...@k@vS16/46/DS43020490. Could I possibly have the spirit of one of your brethren dwelling within me?``
``I don't believe so.``
``Us Ryuun can sense each other's presence, so I would have noticed even if I didn't want to.@k@vS16/45/DS43070842. ...And I have never felt anything like that from you.``
(And besides...)
I had asked Ryuun-Ohc to provide me with medicine to suppress the activation of that factor, and made Riku take it... though he believed it was for a chronic illness.
By no means did I want to believe it, but if by some chance he had the Grifys factor lurking in the depths of his mind, then there was a possibility even I wouldn't notice it.
I wanted to prevent Riku from ending up one of my ``targets`` by whatever means necessary... With that thought in mind I'd paid him special attention.
``It's all right, Riku.@k@vS16/45/DS43070845. Your soul is yours and yours alone, and always has been.@k@vS16/45/DS43070846. No one else's soul has formed yours.``
``Is that right...``
Riku heaved a sigh of relief... I can't imagine it would have felt good to know there was another personality lurking within you, even if it was unconscious most of the time.
But still, even if it was possessing an unformed soul... I'd been made painfully aware of what a grave sin a Ryuun's assimilation was.
Though I only became aware it was a sin through meeting Riku and growing close to him...
``Even though it was a last-ditch effort... we Ryuun are truly sorry for what we have done to the humans of this world, yourself included.``
``We took over others' bodies and minds.@k@vS16/45/DS43070849. ...So perhaps these horns and the hatred we've received as demons is our punishment for that sin.``
``Hanyuu.``
Perhaps it wasn't my sin, since I'd been born in this world. And on closer thought, it didn't make sense for children to have to pay for the sins of their fathers.
Even so, I had the blood of the Ryuun... of the Putus who sinned flowing through my veins. Therefore, I had to abide by that destiny.
``But you could say the same about us humans.``

``We are the ones who created an environment that's difficult for you to live in, simply because you have horns.@k@vS16/46/DS43020495. So I don't think you have to be the only one to blame yourself.``
``...That's true.@k@vS16/45/DS43070851. The Putus who managed to keep their bodies when they passed through the Lynoses were able to reach this world after a long time...``

``But living in a foreign land means facing all different kinds of value differences and conflicting attitudes.@k@vS16/45/DS43070853. I have heard there have been many cases where foreigners have been hated and persecuted as a result.``
...That was the history of the Putus I'd once heard from Ryuun-Ohc.
I have no intention of going into who was in the right, but the natives' feelings seemed only natural in light of the pros and cons.

The immigrants and the natives. It is extremely difficult to hope for co-existence between them even when their civilizations and circumstances are equal. It's practically a miracle to peacefully and amiably establish that sort of thing without conflict.
If anything, this world's civilization was remarkably similar to our species', yet the single outward ``difference`` between us... the horns on our head... was clearly fatal.
In all likelihood... things were unimaginably harsh for the initial immigrants.
Though in my case... I was fully enjoying a peaceful life for now while hiding that ``difference`` thanks to Riku's devoted cooperation.
(However...)

On the other hand, I could not neglect my routine of covertly examining the villagers who carried Grifys bloodlines, confirming at regular intervals that they had not fallen under the influence of my psychic resonance.
changeReason: Clarifies the direction of the psychic influence check, making it clear the narrator is checking whether villagers fell under her influence

TextENGNew: It went without saying that as a Putus, I could possibly be unconsciously influencing any nearby Grifys factors.
It would be horrible if my presence were to cause latent Grifys to awaken, become demons, and attack humans as a result, much like the Putus from 22 years ago.
That was just how much I... that Putus were ``unwelcome guests`` to this village... no, this world.
When I thought that, I started wanting to question if it was really all right for me to stay with Riku like this.
``Still, though, to think you share the same blood as the demons you defended this village from...@k@vS16/46/DS43020497. It's more sad than it is scary.``
``...By nature, our species has developed to specialize in survival instincts, so we tend to favor aggressive thinking and actions in all sorts of ways.``
``In other words, their calling was hunting the natives, even their own brethren on occasion, and thus were sometimes dubbed demons in the tongue of this region.``
``...I hear that is the origin of this village's name, ``Onigafuchi``.``
``...There were also species that were driven to extinction by Grifys who had gone feral.@k@vS16/45/DS43070859. That alone must be avoided, no matter what.``
``That is the final reasoning our species possesses as nomads who abandoned their homeland.@k@vS16/45/DS43070861. So...``
So I search for brethren who are trying to hunt... and occasionally hunt them myself.
I know it's contradictory, but it's my duty... I am a ``kinslayer``.
``So long as we hate and frighten each other, we can bring nothing but misfortune to Ryuun and the humans of this world.``
``Thus, I want to make the co-existence of livelihood and lives of both a reality. Not just because it's the duty I was born with as a Hai, but as a resident of this land.``
``I bear the mission of slaying Grifys in order to eliminate those who would threaten that.@k@vS16/45/DS43070865. And, I...@k@vS16/45/DS43070866. ah!``
I suddenly cut myself off when I got to that point... and laughed.
Then I turned to Riku, who was silently looking up at me with a peaceful expression.
``...I'm sorry.@k@vS16/45/DS43070868. This isn't very interesting, is it?``

``No, that's not it.@k@vS16/46/DS43020500. ...It's just that this story sounds so absurdly large-scale that I'm not confident I can fully understand it.@k@vS16/46/DS43020501. It's so far removed from the world we know.``
True... Riku's impressions were reasonable. If anything, he was sincere for being honest with me.
Even so, my face flushed... I was embarrassed at myself for unintentionally going on and on about something so pedantic.
``But what?``
``I'd at least like to think I understand how you feel.@k@vS16/46/DS43020504. Your earnest feelings.@k@vS16/46/DS43020505. And the kindness of which you wish to value your friends and our friends.``
``So believe me when I say... I find it very much interesting.``
I heard him say that.
The smile he gave me to assuage my fears and feelings of alienation was very happy.
If only it weren't for his crazy ``miko moe`` hobby... no, even in spite of that, it didn't change how I felt for him.
I... like Riku. Though I don't know how he feels about me...
``...Thanks, Riku.@k@vS16/45/DS43070871. You're quite the good person.``
``Oh no, you give me too much credit.@k@vS16/46/DS43020508. I just... well, uh...``
Riku gave me a slightly bashful and bitter smile.
I've learned from living with him that while he's normally glib and adroit, he gets tongue-tied like a child when his true feelings seep out.
I'm probably... the only one who knows that side of him.
``Ah, but Hanyuu.@k@vS16/46/DS43020510. You mentioned that you're still pursuing that one ``Pureblood``, but how exactly do you go about looking for him?``
``I sprinkled a sclerotium marker when I came to Onigafuchi Village.``

``It's completely harmless to you humans,@k@vS16/45/DS43070874. but if a Putus... or a Grifys at risk of demonifying inhales it, the factor directly linked to its hunting instincts will manifest as a presence within three years.``
``Then I locate the person it reacts to, and give them appropriate treatment or judgment.@k@vS16/45/DS43070876. That is my role.``
I myself have maintained my sanity thanks to an immunity drug made by Ryuun-Ohc... Though apparently, it's not very effective in times of extreme emotion.
And if I don't find him... that's the best possible outcome.
That would mean that there are no longer any Putus in this land, and that those with the Grifys factor possess antibodies or immunization for their hunting instincts, allowing me some peace.
(Though... the best possible outcome has never once occurred.)
Even so, I sincerely hope that this may finally be such an exception.
``Then... Hanyuu.``
``If you don't find that demon...@k@vS16/46/DS43020513. and peace comes to this village, and your role comes to an end...@k@vS16/46/DS43020514. what do you plan to do?``
...How strange.
Riku's asking a lot of questions for a change today. Even though he normally doesn't touch on these sorts of topics out of consideration for my position...
``...Good question.@k@vS16/45/DS43070881. Well naturally, after that, I...``
Even so, I blinked and hesitated... before looking up, turning back to Riku, and opening my mouth.
The answer was obvious without even thinking in the first place. As I'd been saying, my mission was to search for those called ``demons`` and take appropriate countermeasures.
So if the ``demon`` here couldn't be found or vanished, I would just move on to the next place a ``demon`` may possibly be lurking.
Of course, I would use this village as a base since it had a Lynos, and stay to recuperate from time to time much like I was doing now.
All the while Riku would continue to grow...
He'd have children, grow old... and after that he'd die.
So I'd only have a few more decades to keep having these fun days with him.
No, the end might come even sooner than that.
After all, in just a few years, Riku would marry someone and have a new family.
Once that happened, I'd probably have fewer opportunities to spend time with him like this.
And then, I...
I... what...?
``...Is something the matter?``
...The moment I saw Riku's face, I became speechless and tongue twisted, so I instinctively looked away.
What had just flashed so casually through my mind... was a future where Riku was married to someone else.
The moment I thought that... my spine shivered from fear and unrest so great even I couldn't believe it, and my heart shook.
(...I don't want that...)
I wouldn't really mind leaving this land for a while.
Nor Riku growing old and eventually dying someday... It was sad, but I was ready for it... at least, I'd like to think I am.
But... Riku falling in love with someone.
Marrying someone... Having a special someone apart from me.
Just thinking of that normal course of action for all creatures alike... tore my heart up.
When I imagined that... I couldn't breathe. My heart raced. I grew dizzy.
...Why?
I could calmly accept even the idea of Riku's death to the point where I felt I'd have to prepare for it.
So why was it that the thought of someone taking Riku... was so agonizing? Why did it hurt so much?
Why was my heart screaming? Why were the corners of my eyes heating up...?
That... was obvious. Even I was well aware of the reason.
...As well as what a foolish and shallow wish I was pushing onto Riku...
``...Hanyuu?``
...If, someday...
If I were to complete my mission and return to Onigafuchi Village to visit Riku...
Only to find some woman I didn't know by his side...
And him... giving her that same kind smile he only showed to me...
How stupid am I...?! What the hell am I thinking...?!
What more could I possibly ask of Riku?
To wish for more would be so... so...!!
``...Hanyuu.``
Just then...
Riku... suddenly spoke... in an uncharacteristically tense and stiff voice.
``Will you... would you keep staying with me? Always?``
``I love you.``
``...When I say I want you to stay with me, I don't mean simply living together.@k@vS16/46/DS43020521. I mean I want us to have a deeper, stronger... heart-to-heart relationship.``
Right then...
I felt a soft, gentle sensation on my hand, and looked down.
Riku's warm hand... was clasped snugly around my own.
``Um, how do I put this...? The truth is, I made a prayer.@k@vS16/46/DS43020523. That I'd tell you this if you wore a miko outfit.``
And it was then and there...
That Riku confessed to me that in this village, it was custom to give someone a handmade silk garment as a sign of courtship.
And that he had faithfully abided by it, and had tried to ensure my outfit matched this village and this shrine...
Wait... Hold on.
So in other words, Riku loves... Huh?
No way...
This has got to be a dream, umm... err...!

``I apologize for getting embarrassed and messing around with you too much as a result.@k@vS16/46/DS43020525. But I swear that my wish has always been serious.@k@vS16/46/DS43020526. And that wish is to be with you for the rest of my life...``
My mind went blank... at Riku's grin.
So... in other words, this is a love confession?
Is he saying... he wants to pledge himself to me?
I loved Riku.
And he loved me...
I was happy.
I was embarrassed, mortified, and abashed.
But more than any of that... I was happy.
I'm sure this is what it must feel like to soar through the clouds.
But...
A sudden gust of wind brought reasoning back to my mind... and wiped away my joy in an instant.
What filled my heart in its place... was anger.
As well as pitch black despair as far as the eye could see.

``...U-umm...@k@vS16/46/DS43020528. Well, as you know, it won't be an easy life.@k@vS16/46/DS43020529. But if we can at least find happiness together, no matter how meager...@k@vS16/46/DS43020530. Hanyuu?``
My whole body trembled.
My fists shook, and I stood up hard enough to shake Riku's hand off.
Unable to hold back the enraged impulses that were threatening to explode, I turned around and ran further through the shrine grounds.
``Hanyuu?@k@vS16/46/DS43020532. What's wrong, Hanyuu?!``
Finding even his confused calls detestable, I kept running without breaking my stride.
Despite that, Riku caught up before I could get far away, and grabbed my arm with my back still turned to him.
``Hanyuu!``
``!@k@vS16/45/DS43070901. Get your hand off of me, you bastard!!``
When I tried to shake him off, I instinctively thrust my elbow out... and felt a dull impact.
I turned around... and even though Riku was holding his side, he refused to let go, and grimaced as he looked at me.
``What on earth is the matter?@k@vS16/46/DS43020535. I apologize if I took the prank too far, so please--``
changeReason: Corrects verb tense from past 'apologized' to present 'apologize' matching Japanese 謝ります (present tense)

TextENGNew: ``No!@k@vS16/45/DS43070903. That's not it... no, you're right that I'm mad at your joking!@k@vS16/45/DS43070904. I never thought you were the kind who'd do something so cruel, Riku!!``
I roared so loud it was like I was coughing up blood, widened my eyes, and scolded Riku.

``...I've let your jokes and pranks slide for the most part!@k@vS16/45/DS43070906. ...But!@k@vS16/45/DS43070907. ...This one was the cruelest shit you could have pulled!@k@vS16/45/DS43070908. Enough mocking me, dammit!!``
``Yes... Yes!@k@vS16/45/DS43070910. I'm sure I love you too!@k@vS16/45/DS43070911. That's exactly why...@k@vS16/45/DS43070912. I can't forgive this joke!``
``Even if it was one of your usual casual games...@k@vS16/45/DS43070914. are you really such a heartless blockhead that you thought it wouldn't hurt me to hear that?!``
``Wha...?@k@vS16/46/DS43020540. N-no! I'm not joking!``
``I'm saying I seriously want to be with you!@k@vS16/46/DS43020542. I would never be insincere about this sort of thing!``
Yeah... maybe that's right.
Seeing Riku so uncharacteristically serious makes me want to hope that's the case.
But...! But...!!
``...I don't... believe you!@k@vS16/45/DS43070917. Like hell I could believe you!!``
``Why, Hanyuu?!``
I could see Riku widening his eyes and gasping in surprise.
And before I knew it...
I couldn't stop... the large drops of liquid falling from the corners of my eyes.
What... was this...?
What was happening... to me?
Could these... be... tears?
Those mysterious things... the people of this world shed to express their emotions when they're sad or in pain?
I was bewildered and confused by this brand-new experience.
So, I too... can shed tears, just like the residents of this world?
And why... am I crying?
Why does my heart ache and hurt so much... why am I sad?
I could see Riku standing in a daze on the spot, his face appearing as a total blur.
Why was I sad? ...That was obvious. There could only be one reason, right?
Because... I loved Riku...
And... because I loved him... I was well aware... of just how much of a taboo it was for my feelings to be reciprocated.
That's why... that's why it hurts... and tears at me so much to have to give up on this dreamlike bliss, even if I have to force myself...!

``...Hanyuu.@k@vS16/46/DS43020546. I'm serious.@k@vS16/46/DS43020547. I'll wait as long as it takes for you to believe me.@k@vS16/46/DS43020548. But I swear that from the bottom of my heart, I truly do lo...``
``I'm all right with being an idiot.@k@vS16/46/DS43020550. But...! At the very least, I swear I am no liar.``
``Liar... You're lying!@k@vS16/45/DS43070925. B-because I...!``
And with those words...
I tore off the hood covering my head.
Under it was...
Two horns.
``...How about now, Riku...?@k@vS16/45/DS43070927. Can you still say you love me after seeing these...?!``
That's right.
This was the faint difference between our species and the natives of this world.
And... it was a clear gulf that was far too vast.
It's because of these horns... that we were called ``monsters`` from the start, no matter how resolved we were to get along with them.
I had made my peace with it... no, I had resigned myself to the fact that nothing could be done... and just when I had finally grown accustomed to that resignation, this man--!

``...In this land, those with horns on their heads are called demons!@k@vS16/45/DS43070929. No, there is no country or even settlement in this world that would ever welcome these horns with open arms!``
``No matter how much I wish to co-exist with your kind, your kind has feared, loathed, and rejected me up until now!``
``The more I learn that kind people such as yourself are exceptions amongst exceptions, the more I'm made painfully aware that is natural!``
``If you know, then how...@k@vS16/45/DS43070933. How can you say something so cruel?!``
...That's right.
Riku and I could never be together... no, we mustn't be together.
Demons and humans. You could replace the former with ``Ryuun``, but it was the same in the end.
There should have only been a small difference in our genes... yet it was a taboo relationship, where our feelings could never be fulfilled.
Yeah, I'll honestly admit it... I love Riku. I love him more than anything else.
Just how many times over these last two years have I dreamed of getting together with Riku and becoming his wife, only to wake up and feel my heart crushed with agony...?!
I'd given up for so long.
Even though I loved him... no, because I loved him, my feelings would bring Riku suffering and burden him with heavy worries.
...Because of that, from the bottom of my heart I was terrified of destroying the comfortable and gentle relationship we had right now.
And yet...
And yet, I...!
``Hanyuu...``
Why... why can't I run away from this place?
Why was I waiting for his next words...?!
``I love you with all that I am.``
``...You're lying.``
``It's true.@k@vS16/46/DS43020556. From the bottom of my heart, I lov...``
``Liar!@k@vS16/45/DS43070937. Like... like hell I'd believe you!!``
I shook my head so hard in denial and rejection that it disheveled my hair.
Despite that, Riku repeated himself... in an astonishingly foolish and gentle voice.
``I love you... Hanyuu.``

``...@k@vS16/45/DS43070939. It doesn't make any sense, does it?@k@vS16/45/DS43070940. It's weird, isn't it?@k@vS16/45/DS43070941. Of course a girl with horns like these is disgusting...!@k@vS16/45/DS43070942. I-if I were in your position, I'm sure I... I'd...!``
``...They're beautiful.``
``They look very good on you, and they're cute.@k@vS16/46/DS43020560. ...Now that I've fallen in love with you, I believe that from the bottom of my heart.``
When I heard that...
I finally realized I'd been hanging my head down, and looked up.
Even though it wasn't raining, my face was soaking wet and felt gross... and everything in front of me was so distorted I could barely see.
But...
``I love you.@k@vS16/46/DS43020562. ...Hanyuu.``
For some reason, his smile when he said that... seemed so lovely, sublime, and dazzling... that I never wanted to forget for the rest of eternity.
...Riku.
Are you really okay with me?
Are you really okay with choosing me?
I timidly looked back at Riku with those thoughts in mind... and he turned to me with a smile and nodded.
...You don't have to say anything else.
Please tell me how you feel, Hanyuu...
I was happy.
And... I nearly shivered from an equal amount of hesitation and fear running through my body.
But...
To stumble headlong into unhappiness seemed incomparably more appealing to me than the regret of never having taken that step at all...
changeReason: Adds the 'incomparably' intensifier present in the Japanese 喩えようもないほど

TextENGNew: I tightly and firmly... gripped the hand he held out to me.
``...You're making... because of...``
I wiped my tears with my sleeves, and swallowed all sorts of feelings that had been stuck in my throat.
Then I made every effort to put on my normal face... and squeezed my voice out with a snort.

``...You're making... a misunderstanding ... because of... these strange clothes...!@k@vS16/45/DS43070949. If only you'd said it normally... with ordinary clothes...@k@vS16/45/DS43070950. this would... have never... happened...!``
``It's completely screwed up... you idiot!@k@vS16/45/DS43070952. Please get some common sense for a change...!!``
...I hated myself for instinctively scolding him against my better judgment at a time like this, but Riku just accepted it peacefully.
That made me happy. So very happy...!
``...I'll reflect on that from now on.@k@vS16/46/DS43020565. So... could you give your answer?``

``...!@k@vS16/45/DS43070954. You're going to regret this...@k@vS16/45/DS43070955. I know for a fact you'll really come to regret this!!@k@vS16/45/DS43070956. So why... why do I love... someone like this...?!``
At the same time I said that, the drops remaining in my eyes streamed down my cheeks.
But...
For some reason, they felt warm... and afterwards, I wailed out loud in Riku's arms... but strangely enough, not out of sorrow.
